race.comment: OLINGTON LANE (3) talented gelding who failed to remain unbeaten at his third start when struggling in the heavy going to run fourth over 1300m at Kembla Grange in BVM64 grade. This looks more to his liking on the firmer surface. SURE INTENTIONS (7) frustrating gelding who comes back to his right trip today. Never comfortable on the synthetic track when sixth over 1750m at Canberra Acton. Capable of featuring prominently from the inside draw. SPIRITUAL STAR (5) tough Maiden win at start six over 1405m at the Sapphire Coast from a wide barrier. Today is no easier and place claims look best. SPIRITUAL STAR (5) struggling to draw a decent gate and today is no different. Rewarded for his consistent with a game Maiden win at the Sapphire Coast over 1405m. Place best.
